steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student is showing that Ecuador hosts different types of volcanoes. The example needs a pair from the table where each volcano is a different type and is correctly classified.

steps.title: Match the table data
steps.content:
From the table, (D) Fernandina is a shield volcano and Chimborazo is a stratovolcano — two different types, both correctly identified.

(A), (B), and (C) misclassify at least one volcano (e.g., Chimborazo isn't a caldera; Chacana isn't a shield).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
